rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PATRICIA HARRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Terrance Hall Motion To Set Aside Default And Motion To Vacate Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Possession; Memo Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 05, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT TERRANCE HALL'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Motion To Vacate Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Possession; Memo Of Points And Authorities DENIED. There is no default against Mr. Hall in this case. Also, Judgment for possession covers solely Ms. Harris and does not include "all occupants of the premises, including, tenants, subtenants if any, and named claimants if any." (See Judgment, paragraph 5). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: A & S SCHLESINGER FLP VS. SARAH WILLIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 05, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT SARAH WILLIS' AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant improperly raises factual disputes on demurrer. Verification and the Notice are sufficient on their face. = (501/CFH)
